pull_request.title: Fix ProgramCurated payload encoding and add regression tests
pull_request.body:
## Summary
- fix `ProgramCurated` codec encoding to include the on-chain 32-byte reserved payload instead of encoding an empty struct
- update lib action builder so `programCurated()` emits a 32-byte payload (`8-byte header + 32-byte payload`)
- add regression coverage for payload encoding and SignV2 behavior with ProgramCurated permissions

## Validation
- `bun --filter \"@swig-wallet/coder\" build`
- `bun --filter \"@swig-wallet/lib\" test -- tests/actions/builder.test.ts tests/instructions/signProgramCurated.test.ts`
- manual local Surfpool flow (`devnet` fork on `127.0.0.1:8897`):
  - create swig + add authority with `ProgramCurated + SolLimit`
  - run SignV2 system transfer successfully
  - verify non-curated program SignV2 attempt is rejected
